# Nave

> Nave is a Content Operating System (Content OS) built for Claude Code. It installs a complete content department on your machine: a crew of brand-tuned agents covers every stage of content production — pre-production, production, post-production, distribution, engagement and inbox — directed by the operator. One day of direction becomes a month of finished, on-brand content, staged behind the owner's approval. You own the system; it runs on your own Claude Code subscription.

Tagline: One video in. A batch of review-ready content out. You direct. It produces.
Maker: INFINITX (https://infinitxai.com/). Founder: Enrique Marquez. Site: https://nave.infinitxai.com/

## What it is
- A system you install and OWN (files on your machine), not a hosted SaaS. Skills, agents, and dynamic workflows for Claude Code (runs on Codex too).
- A brand-setup interview scopes it to one brand — voice, colors, pillars — and every agent reads that brand layer before producing.
- Function-named skills organized by department lane: strategy · pre-production · production · post-production · distribution · engagement · inbox · analytics · memory.
- Nothing publishes itself: every piece is staged behind the owner's approval gate ("review, then say 'schedule it'").

## The offers
- Free playbook — "How to Make a Month of Content in a Single Day": the full method, real steps in order, delivered by email. No purchase required. (https://nave.infinitxai.com/)
- Agentic AI Content — the community, THE main offer: the Nave Content OS installed on your machine, 10+ hours of training in build order, live calls 2x a week, unlimited same-day support, and a weekly vault of new agents and skills. $58/month founding price, locked for life. A full month of content in 30 days, or your money back. Cancel anytime and keep the OS you installed. (https://nave.infinitxai.com/join)
- Custom Content OS build, done for you — $2,500–$7,500 one-time, scoped on a call: the system tailor-built for a business (formats, brand, machines, team training), first month produced together. (https://nave.infinitxai.com/done-for-you)

## Requirements
Your own Claude Code (your Claude subscription — no separate Anthropic API key; Claude Max recommended for full-volume runs), plus your own keys for the tools Nave orchestrates: AssemblyAI (transcription) and Zernio (publishing + comment/DM automation), with an optional Kie.ai key for AI images/covers/music. Research runs on Claude Code's built-in web search. The installer sets up ffmpeg, the render engine, and the face-tracking reframe engine, and verifies a real render.

## Proof
500k+ organic views in the founder's last 6 months were produced by this OS. The nave.infinitxai.com site itself — copy, pages, emails — is produced by the system it describes. (Results shown are the founder's own. Not typical, and not a guarantee.)
